items.title: palmier-pro
items.description: macOS video editor built for AI
items.description_zh: 专为 AI 打造的 macOS 视频编辑器

items.title: penpot
items.description: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration
items.description_zh: Penpot：用于设计和代码协作的开源设计工具

items.title: OpenMontage
items.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
items.description_zh: 世界上第一个开源的代理视频制作系统。 12条管道、52种工具、500+座席技能。将您的人工智能编码助手变成一个完整的视频制作工作室。

items.title: turso
items.description: Turso is an in-process SQL database, compatible with SQLite.
items.description_zh: Turso 是一个进程内 SQL 数据库，与 SQLite 兼容。

items.title: codebase-memory-mcp
items.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
items.description_zh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——以毫秒为单位的平均存储库。 158 种语言，亚毫秒级查询，标记减少 99%。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖性。

items.title: timesfm
items.description: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
items.description_zh: TimesFM（时间序列基础模型）是 Google Research 开发的用于时间序列预测的预训练时间序列基础模型。

items.title: twenty
items.description: The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.
items.description_zh: Salesforce 的开放替代方案，专为 AI 设计。

items.title: insomnia
items.description: The open-source, cross-platform API client for GraphQL, REST, WebSockets, SSE and gRPC. With Cloud, Local and Git storage.
items.description_zh: 适用于 GraphQL、REST、WebSockets、SSE 和 gRPC 的开源、跨平台 API 客户端。具有云、本地和 Git 存储。

items.title: Pake
items.description: 🤱🏻 Turn any webpage into a desktop app with one command.
items.description_zh: 🤱🏻 只需一个命令即可将任何网页变成桌面应用程序。

items.title: headroom
items.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
items.description_zh: 在工具输出、日志、文件和 RAG 块到达 LLM 之前对其进行压缩。减少 60-95% 的标记，答案相同。库、代理、MCP 服务器。

items.title: voicebox
items.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
items.description_zh: 开源人工智能语音工作室。克隆、指令、创造。

items.title: kilocode
items.description: Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform. Build, ship, and iterate faster with the most popular open source coding agent.
items.description_zh: Kilo 是一款一体化代理工程平台。使用最流行的开源编码代理更快地构建、发布和迭代。

items.title: skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.description_zh: 真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

items.title: awesome-artificial-intelligence
items.description: A curated list of Artificial Intelligence (AI) courses, books, video lectures and papers.
items.description_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 课程、书籍、视频讲座和论文的精选列表。
